drizzle-schema.rule: Drizzle table style mirrors agent-mcp: sqliteTable(...), text().primaryKey(), integer(...,{mode:'boolean'}) for flags, text(...,{mode:'json'}) for JSON arrays/schemas, index(...), .references(...) for within-package FKs. agent_tools.agent_slug is a logical text key (no cross-package FK into agent-registry).

store-class.rule: Store classes mirror agent-mcp: constructor takes a BetterSQLite3Database, methods are thin Drizzle queries, errors are typed codes. AgentToolStore.grant persists the permission arg verbatim; ToolBindingStore.resolve(toolName, platform) is the join the compiler/migration consume.
